title: Slovakian Dumplings with Tamarind Sauce
description: A hearty Slovakian-inspired dish featuring tender dumplings in a tangy tamarind sauce.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Carefully add the Slovakian dumplings to the boiling water.
Cook for 10-12 minutes or until the dumplings are cooked through.
While the dumplings are cooking, combine the tamarind paste and water in a saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 5 minutes.
Serve the cooked dumplings with the tamarind sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped herbs and serve with chewy bread on the side.
